🎯 How SAP King works:
📖 Step 1 — Open and read the first 3 topics in ERP & SAP Overview (~20 min total)
🔓 Step 2 — All modules unlock automatically — no quiz needed to unlock
🆓 Step 3 — Pick ONE free module: SD, MM or FI — 100% content free forever
💰 Step 4 — Additional modules ₹199 each · Certificates ₹99 / ₹199 / ₹349 per level
⚡ Pass quizzes → earn XP → level up → build your SAP career!
